Query.Join: cpr.party_role_code in ('DEFENDANT', 'PT 20 DEF') and cpr.case_number NOT IN ( select j.case_number from judgments j where j.against_party_role_code = cpr.party_role_code and j.case_number = cpr.case_number and j.against_case_party_no = cpr.case_party_no and (j.status is null or j.status = 'VARIED'))
